calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition Objecting To Subpoena Of Law Office Of Art Dula Et Al. For Production Of Records In Action Pending Outside California
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PETITIONER MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP Petition Objecting To Subpoena Of Law Office Of Art Dula, et al. For Production Of Records In Action Pending Outside California is denied without prejudice. It appears the case was filed on December 6, 2016, but Respondent has not appeared in this action and has no attorney of record. Petitioner's proof of service indicates notice of the petition was served to an attorney in Los Angeles, California, on December 9, 2016, by U.S. Mail and Electronic Mail. However there is no evidence before the Court that the attorney in Los Angeles is authorized to accept service of the petition on behalf of the Respondent. Therefore the Court cannot conclude, on this record, that the petition was properly served. The Court will prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
